name: thecodeman-ai-toolkit
description: AI skills and agents for mid/senior .NET developers — EF Core, performance, architecture, testing, security, observability, and DevOps. By TheCodeMan.net.

plugins.name: dotnet-ai-toolkit
plugins.description: 44+ Claude skills and 7 specialist agents that run on your real .NET code: EF Core query optimization, Minimal API & architecture scaffolding, xUnit/Testcontainers tests, JWT auth, OpenTelemetry, code review, security audits, and more. Built for modern .NET 10 / C# 14.
